title: Lipetsk, Lipetsk Oblast — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

content:
Overview

Lipetsk is a city in Lipetsk Oblast with a population of 510,000. A major steel production center in the Black Earth region, known for the Novolipetsk Steel plant and its modern urban development.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
